name: Model Setup & HF Token Configuration
description: Initial app setup: verifies launch state, opens Settings, enters a HuggingFace token, and dismisses the sheet.

steps.description: Verify the app is launched and ContentView is active.
Tap the Settings (gearshape) button in the header.
Verify the Settings view sheet is displayed.
Enter the HuggingFace token into the token text field.
Tap 'Done' to close the settings sheet.
